title: Modular Pipeline Test
script:
This is a test of the modular pipeline. [Visual: technology abstract] [Transition: fade] [Grade: warm]
Each stage runs independently. [Visual: computer circuit board] [KenBurns: off]
You can edit single scenes. [Visual: code programming] [Style: top] [Color: yellow]
Voice, visuals, and render are separate. [Visual: digital transformation] [FadeIn: 0.3]
Modular pipeline complete. [Visual: success rocket launch] [Transition: zoomblur]

title: 3-Scene Hook First
script:
Did you know AI coding assistants can write 1000 lines per minute? [Visual: AI coding] [Grade: warm] [Transition: fade]
The key detail about AI coding tools is what separates beginners from pros. [Visual: code programming] [KenBurns: on] [CaptionTheme: neon]
Apply this one idea about AI coding and you'll see the difference immediately. [Visual: developer workspace] [Grade: cinematic] [Transition: slide]

title: 3-Scene No Hook
script:
Most video editors waste hours on manual tasks. [Visual: video editing] [Grade: cool] [Transition: cut]
Here's how to automate your editing workflow. [Visual: editing software] [KenBurns: off] [CaptionTheme: bold]
These shortcuts will save you 10 hours per week. [Visual: productivity] [Grade: vivid] [Transition: zoomblur]

title: 5-Scene Story Arc
script:
Every startup begins with a single idea. [Visual: idea lightbulb] [Grade: warm] [Transition: fade]
The first prototype is always rough. [Visual: prototype sketch] [Grade: neutral] [Transition: slide]
Then comes the moment of truth — the first customer. [Visual: first customer] [Grade: cinematic] [Transition: zoomblur]
Growth accelerates, but challenges multiply. [Visual: growth chart] [Grade: vivid] [Transition: cut]
The key insight: persistence beats talent when talent doesn't work hard. [Visual: success] [Grade: warm] [Transition: fade]

title: 4-Scene Product Promo
script:
Tired of complex photo editing? [Visual: frustrated user] [Grade: cool] [Transition: slide]
Meet the AI photo editor that does it all. [Visual: AI photo editor] [Grade: vivid] [Transition: zoomblur]
One click transforms your photos. [Visual: before after] [Grade: warm] [Transition: cut]
Ready to revolutionize your workflow? [Visual: call to action] [Grade: cinematic] [Transition: fade]

title: 3-Scene Motivational
script:
Failure is not the opposite of success — it IS success. [Visual: failure success] [Grade: cinematic] [Transition: fade] [CaptionTheme: neon]
Every setback is a setup for a comeback. [Visual: comeback] [Grade: warm] [Transition: zoomblur] [Kinetic: on]
Your breakthrough is closer than you think. [Visual: breakthrough] [Grade: vivid] [Transition: slide] [CaptionTheme: bold]

title: 3-Scene Nature
script:
Deep in the forest, nature reveals its secrets. [Visual: forest wildlife] [Grade: cinematic] [Transition: fade]
Every creature plays its part in the ecosystem. [Visual: ecosystem] [Grade: cool] [Transition: slide]
The most beautiful moments happen in silence. [Visual: peaceful nature] [Grade: neutral] [Transition: fade]

title: SF: Download Images Only
script:
Space is vast and mysterious. [Visual: galaxy nebula]
Black holes bend light. [Visual: black hole]
We explore with telescopes. [Visual: space telescope]

title: SF: Download Videos Only
script:
The ocean moves in endless rhythm. [Visual: ocean waves]
Waves crash on cliffs. [Visual: cliff waves]
Calm seas soothe the mind. [Visual: calm sea]

title: SF: Voice Only (Edge-TTS)
script:
Start your day with intention. [Visual: sunrise]
Small steps build momentum. [Visual: steps]
You are capable of more. [Visual: mountain]

title: SF: Voice Only (Voicebox/Kokoro)
script:
A new model broke benchmarks today. [Visual: AI chip]
Open source is winning. [Visual: open source]
The future is local. [Visual: local server]

title: ADV: Full Advanced Config Demo
script: Did you know the sun is 93 million miles away? [Visual: sun flare] [Caption: mind blown] Space is completely silent. [Visual: nebula] Black holes bend light itself. [Visual: black hole]
